patterns.message: Do not import module internals directly. Use the module barrel export (index.ts) or shared contracts instead.
Do not import module internal layers. Use the contracts/ barrel export or the Internal API Registry.
Do not import module models directly from outside. Use the Internal API facade (shared/internal-api) instead.
Prefer importing from the owning module's re-exports (modules/itsm/core-re-exports, modules/forms/core-re-exports, or shared/engines) instead of core/ directly.
